title: FW Request: Elecrow Crowpanel 5.0 Advance, board v1.1

messages.author: iron._.nick
messages.text: Recently I've seen more Elecrow devices popping up under MC. So I was wondering if there are people who have interest in a 5 inch touch screen MC device? In my opinion it looks great, it's portable and would be a cool, modern stand-alone MC device.
messages.content_html: Recently I've seen more Elecrow devices popping up under MC. So I was wondering if there are people who have interest in a 5 inch touch screen MC device? In my opinion it looks great, it's portable and would be a cool, modern stand-alone MC device.

messages.author: NoahK
messages.text: I'm down. Need to make something attractive for my wife and family to want to use it.
messages.content_html: I'm down. Need to make something attractive for my wife and family to want to use it.

messages.author: pelgraine
messages.text: Would also be interested in this. accidentally bought the 7inch version of this device on a 3am impulse buy (had meant to buy their p4 version) but ended up keeping it and am keen to get Meshcore onto it somehow. The one I have is the v1.3 of the hardware so not currently compatible with Meshtastic
messages.content_html: Would also be interested in this. accidentally bought the 7inch version of this device on a 3am impulse buy (had meant to buy their p4 version) but ended up keeping it and am keen to get Meshcore onto it somehow. The one I have is the v1.3 of the hardware so not currently compatible with Meshtastic

messages.author: Bruce
messages.text: I have the 3.5" version of this. Bought it way back when when I still had hopes of a working MT mesh.
messages.content_html: I have the 3.5" version of this. Bought it way back when when I still had hopes of a working MT mesh.

messages.author: iron._.nick
messages.text: @Bruce it has no display output or just the touchscreen does not work?
messages.content_html: @Bruce it has no display output or just the touchscreen does not work?

messages.author: pelgraine
messages.text: Do you happen to have a link to the repo for that?
messages.content_html: Do you happen to have a link to the repo for that?
messages.reply_html:
Bruce
Someone has ported the standard MC firmware for it but it's not that useful. (Does not really take advantage of the touchscreen.)

messages.author: Bruce
messages.text: The touchscreen works but it's the standard firmware. Like on a Heltec V3. So you actually don't want it. Because then you can't put it in your pocket.
messages.content_html: The touchscreen works but it's the standard firmware. Like on a Heltec V3. So you actually don't want it. Because then you can't put it in your pocket.
messages.reactions_html: 1
messages.reply_html:
iron._.nick
@Bruce it has no display output or just the touchscreen does not work?

messages.text: It's from @docmeth02 . I thought he responded to you. https://discord.com/channels/1343693475589263471/1343746774971715655/1467543895939223722 (edited)

messages.author: pelgraine
messages.text: Thanks for that. Turns out that was written for the v1.0 board so isn't compatible with the v1.3 I've got. Will have a fiddle around with the code to see if I can get it working
